description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push, pull request, and a scheduled cron job. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: format, build-linux, build-linux-python, coverage, build-windows, and semantic-release. The format job uses a reusable workflow from Geode-solutions/actions. The build jobs use reusable workflows from Geode-solutions/actions with specific inputs and secrets. The semantic-release job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, and runs semantic-release with a GITHUB_TOKEN from secrets.
